use_cases: Visualizing activity density patterns over time periods
Displaying user engagement metrics with color-coded intensity
Showing time-series data distribution across categories
Rendering usage analytics in dashboard interfaces
Comparing relative values across multiple data bins
ai_summary: A customizable heatmap chart component that visualizes data density and intensity using color gradients. Supports both circular and rectangular bin layouts with configurable margins and dimensions. Uses hot-to-cool color scales to represent value distribution, making it ideal for displaying activity patterns, engagement metrics, and comparative analytics in dashboard or analytics interfaces.
